name: Red Curry Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tablespoons Prepared Red Thai Curry Paste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the brown sugar and cornstarch. Whisk in the coconut milk, beef broth, soy sauce, curry paste, and lemon peel.
2. Heat a 11-12 inch non-stick frying pan over high heat. When hot, add the beef and stir until the beef is browned slightly, about 2 minutes. Remove the beef from the pan.
3. Add the curry mixture to the pan and stir until boiling. Return the beef to the pan and stir just until hot, about one minute.
4. Mix pasta with the cilantro and oil. To serve, place pasta on a plate and top with the beef curry sauce.
